items.title: Shelton stops Cobolli to win Munich Open title
items.summary: Ben Shelton bounced back from disappointment last year by defeating Flavio Cobolli 6-2, 7-5 to win the Munich Open on Sunday.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Rosenior: Estêvão in tears after 'devastating' injury
items.summary: Chelsea boss Liam Rosenior has revealed that Estêvão was in tears at half-time after he was forced off with an injury early in his side's defeat to Manchester United on Sunday.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Dexter Lawrence trade reaction: Bengals' shocking move sends clear message to the rest of the NFL
items.summary: Cincinnati dealt a top-10 pick for Dexter Lawrence, added multiple defensive pieces in free agency and made its clearest statement yet about maximizing Joe Burrow's championship...
